title: Material Incident Notification
verbatim: Financial institutions shall notify Bank Negara Malaysia of all material technology and cybersecurity incidents within four hours of detection. The notification shall include the nature of the incident, systems affected, estimated impact, and initial response actions. A detailed follow-up report shall be submitted within fourteen days.
translation: Notify BNM within 4 hours of detecting any material technology or cybersecurity incident. Include what happened, what systems are affected, estimated impact, and what you are doing about it. Submit a detailed follow-up report within 14 days.

artifacts.name: BNM Incident Notification Procedure
artifacts.description: Procedure for notifying BNM of material incidents within four hours

artifacts.name: Notification Templates
artifacts.description: Templates for initial notification and 14-day follow-up report to BNM

artifacts.name: Notification Records
artifacts.description: Records of all BNM incident notifications and follow-up reports

title: Technology Project Notification
verbatim: Financial institutions shall notify Bank Negara Malaysia of major technology projects that may have a significant impact on the institution's operations or customers. Notification shall be made at least three months prior to the planned implementation and shall include project scope, risk assessment, and implementation timeline.
translation: Notify BNM about major technology projects at least three months before implementation. Include the project scope, risk assessment, and implementation timeline. This applies to projects that could significantly affect operations or customers.

artifacts.description: Procedure for notifying BNM of major technology projects

artifacts.name: Project Notification Records
artifacts.description: Records of technology project notifications submitted to BNM

artifacts.name: Major Project Risk Assessments
artifacts.description: Risk assessments for major projects submitted as part of BNM notification

title: Outsourcing Notification
verbatim: Financial institutions shall notify Bank Negara Malaysia of material outsourcing arrangements involving technology services. Notification shall be made prior to entering into the outsourcing arrangement and shall include the scope of outsourced services, risk assessment, and oversight mechanisms.
translation: Before entering into any material technology outsourcing arrangement, notify BNM. Include the scope of services being outsourced, the risk assessment, and how you will oversee the arrangement.

artifacts.description: Records of outsourcing notifications submitted to BNM

title: Cloud Adoption Notification
verbatim: Financial institutions shall notify Bank Negara Malaysia prior to the adoption of cloud services for critical systems or systems that process, store, or transmit customer data. The notification shall include the cloud risk assessment, data residency arrangements, and the shared responsibility model with the cloud service provider.
translation: Before using cloud services for critical systems or customer data, notify BNM. Include your cloud risk assessment, data residency arrangements, and the shared responsibility model with your cloud provider.
evidence: Cloud risk assessments submitted to BNM
Data residency and shared responsibility documentation

title: Technology Audit Findings
verbatim: Financial institutions shall report significant technology audit findings to Bank Negara Malaysia in a timely manner. Findings that indicate material weaknesses in technology risk management, cybersecurity controls, or regulatory compliance shall be reported within thirty days of the audit report being finalised.
translation: Report significant IT audit findings to BNM within 30 days of the audit report being finalised. This applies to findings that indicate material weaknesses in technology risk management, cybersecurity, or regulatory compliance.
evidence: Audit finding reporting procedure for BNM

artifacts.description: Records of significant audit findings reported to BNM within 30 days

artifacts.description: Criteria for determining which audit findings require BNM notification

title: Regulatory Examination Response
verbatim: Financial institutions shall respond to Bank Negara Malaysia regulatory examination findings within the timeframes specified by the Bank. Action plans shall be developed for all findings and progress shall be reported to the board and to the Bank as required. The institution shall cooperate fully with regulatory examinations.
translation: Respond to BNM examination findings within the required timeframes. Develop action plans for every finding and report progress to both the board and BNM. Full cooperation with regulatory examinations is mandatory.
evidence: Progress reports to BNM and board

title: Annual Technology Risk Report
verbatim: Financial institutions shall submit an annual technology risk report to Bank Negara Malaysia. The report shall include an assessment of the institution's technology risk posture, significant incidents during the reporting period, key risk indicators, and planned technology risk management initiatives for the coming year.
translation: Submit an annual technology risk report to BNM covering your current risk posture, significant incidents from the past year, key risk metrics, and your plans for improving technology risk management in the coming year.
evidence: Annual technology risk report submitted to BNM
Planned initiatives for the coming year
